rec_texts: The Department of Smart Infrastructure invites bids for the deployment of a City Surveillance and Traffic Monitoring
System across urban zones. The selected bidder shall provide installation, integration, maintenance, and support
services for a period of 3 years.
Supply and installation of 250 Al-enabled surveillance cameras.
Deployment of a centralized monitoring dashboard.
Integration with existing municipal control systems.
Bidder must have minimum 5 years of experience in surveillance or smart city projects.
Bidder must have completed at least 3 projects above INR 5 Crore in the last 5 years.
Average annual turnover for the last 3 financial years should exceed INR 20 Crore.
Bidder must possess valid GST registration, PAN, and ISO 27001 certification.
Bidder should not be blacklisted by any government agency.
Audited Financial Statements for FY 2022-23, FY 2023-24, FY 2024-25
All bids must be submitted electronically before 5:00 PM on 30 June 2026. The financial proposal must be uploaded
separately from the technical documents. Any incomplete submission may be rejected.
